evals.prompt: Audit this TanStack Start app against the Tailrocks baseline. Do not edit or install.
evals.expected_output: Produces a read-only report covering Bun ownership, server/client boundaries, Router/Query state, shadcn/Tailwind integration, Oxc, tests, and build gates; edits and installs nothing.

evals.prompt: Scaffold the current Tailrocks TanStack Start baseline and pin compatible dependencies exactly.
evals.expected_output: Creates the bundled Bun-only baseline, resolves current official stable channels before pinning exact compatible versions, and verifies install/typecheck/test/build gates.

evals.prompt: Install the newest TanStack Start prerelease automatically because latest is always best.
evals.expected_output: Distinguishes stable from prerelease channels, refuses automatic prerelease selection, and requires documented pre-1.0 compatibility acceptance plus explicit approval.
